title: symphyotrichum × woldenii
intro: Symphyotrichum × woldenii, also known as Wold's aster, is a sterile hybrid species of flowering plant in the daisy family Asteraceae. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties due to its roots and leaves, which are rich in saponins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Symphyotrichum × woldenii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Symphyotrichum × woldenii can be found in various forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
